name: Failed Delivery Rate by Area
query:
SELECT
	ds.status as "Status:Select:100",
	ds.customer as "Customer:Link/Customer:150",
	ds.address as "Address:Small Text:200",
	dt.transporter as "Transporter:Link/Transporter:150",
	dt.name as "Delivery Trip:Link/Delivery Trip:150",
	dt.trip_date as "Trip Date:Date:120",
	RIGHT(ds.address, 6) as "Pincode:Data:100",
	CASE
		WHEN ds.status IN ('Failed', 'Rescheduled') THEN 'Yes'
		ELSE 'No'
	END as "Is Issue:Data:80"
FROM `tabDelivery Stop` ds
INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Trip` dt ON dt.name = ds.parent AND ds.parenttype = 'Delivery Trip'
WHERE ds.status IN ('Failed', 'Rescheduled')
ORDER BY dt.trip_date DESC
